Package tellui.core.base

Class UIHost.HostBridge

java.lang.Object
tellui.core.base.UIHost.HostBridge
Enclosing class:
UIHost
public static final class UIHost.HostBridge extends Object
Provides the bridge between Processing and TellUI.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    draw()
    Called by Processing's draw loop.
    static boolean
    isAllowed()
    Checks whether it is allowed to call draw() on UIHost directly.
    void

    Called by Processing on key events.
    void

    Called by Processing on mouse events.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    equals, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Method Details

    • draw

      public void draw()
      Called by Processing's draw loop. Do not call manually. This method triggers the UI rendering and manages internal state.

    • keyEvent

      public void keyEvent(processing.event.KeyEvent keyEvent)
      Called by Processing on key events. Dispatches the event to the container manager.
      Parameters:
      keyEvent - the Processing key event

    • mouseEvent

      public void mouseEvent(processing.event.MouseEvent mouseEvent)
      Called by Processing on mouse events. Dispatches the event to the container manager.
      Parameters:
      mouseEvent - the Processing mouse event

    • isAllowed

      public static boolean isAllowed()
      Checks whether it is allowed to call draw() on UIHost directly. Used internally to prevent manual rendering.
      Returns:
      true if draw() is being called from the host bridge, false otherwise
